name: egx-pro-hub-web-auto-mubasher-safe

scripts.build:trust: node scripts/build-price-reconciliation-report.js && node scripts/build-final-opportunity-ranking.js && node scripts/build-multi-source-intelligence.js && node scripts/apply-multisource-intelligence-to-ranking.js && node scripts/build-recommendation-trust-governor.js && node scripts/build-unified-decision-board.js
scripts.validate: node -c index.html >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; node -c scripts/build-recommendation-trust-governor.js && node -c scripts/build-unified-decision-board.js && node -c scripts/build-multi-source-intelligence.js

description: EGX Pro Hub static public-delayed market intelligence terminal with strict trust governor
